title: xarop.com
body:
**Updating the xarop.com site**  
xarop.com is a domain I've owned since March 25, 1998. Throughout this time it has served many purposes, from a site offering both hosting and design to even modem connections. [See the history of the various versions of xarop.](http://web.archive.org/web/*/http://www.xarop.com) I am currently working on a new redesign and creating a site with a specific purpose. Now you can see articles about design and stability. I want to dedicate this site to topics that affect me professionally. I look forward to your comments and suggestions. [www.xarop.com](http://www.xarop.com)
